lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do you work in a fishing colony?

lines.speaker: Ramara du Croissant
lines.text: Ahh, it is because I love the sea. The rushing waters, the endless horizon - it is beautiful! Also, I like the fresh fish.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It seems like rather hard work - can't you just get a beach house on Karamja?

lines.speaker: Ramara du Croissant
lines.text: That, I am afraid, is not an option for me. Besides, I have read of the island of Karamja - it is full of big green spiders, and I like them not!

lines.speaker: Ramara du Croissant
lines.text: Oui, I 'ave perfected zis accent for when I worked for my father in Ardougne. He is a baker in ze market, and 'e believes ze customers will think ze bread of higher quality if it is made by a foreigner.

lines.speaker: Ramara du Croissant
lines.text: Perhaps. I do not care for ze bread; it is ze fish zat shall be my future.

lines.speaker: Player
